jsonLd.title: Medanta is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Medanta has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!
